name: Tortilla Pizzas
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded Cheddar or mozzarella cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Melt butter in a medium skillet over medium heat.
3. Add chicken, oregano, salt, and black pepper; cook and stir for 3-5 minutes. Remove chicken with a slotted spoon and place in a bowl.
4. Pour oil into the same skillet until it reaches a depth of 1/4 inch. Heat over medium-high heat.
5. Cook one tortilla in hot oil about 1 minute, or until crisp. Remove tortilla from the skillet; drain on paper towels and place on a large baking sheet. Repeat with remaining tortillas.
6. Spoon 1/4 of the chicken mixture evenly over each tortilla.
7. Top each with 2 tablespoons tomato, 2 tablespoons onion, 1 tablespoon green pepper, 2 tablespoons pizza sauce, and 1/4 cup cheese.
8. Bake for 5 minutes, or until cheese melts. Garnish with chili peppers if desired.
